# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We release security updates for the latest version of Open Code Review.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it by:

1. Creating a new **Security Advisory** in the [Security tab](https://github.com/raye-deng/open-code-review/security).
2. Or emailing us at security@evallab.ai.

Please **do not** open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a fix or mitigation as soon as possible.
